Operation 'AddComment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks critical details about what inputs are expected (comment text in request body), what the response contains (comment object structure), and the side effects (comment visibility to task collaborators). The description also includes unnecessary permission information that doesn't add operational clarity. The improved description specifies the input requirements, return value structure, and the effect of adding a comment, making it significantly more useful for AI agents determining when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description:
Adds a comment to a [VTEX DO](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-do--7KMbRL4OslN8DTX9oiuCiu) task, filtering by task ID.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
data.description_suggestion: Adds a comment to a VTEX DO task identified by the task ID. The comment text is provided in the request body. This operation allows task collaborators to add notes and updates to task discussions. Returns the created comment object with metadata including the comment ID, author, timestamp, and content. The comment is immediately visible to all users with access to the task.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks critical details about what inputs are expected (comment text in request body), what the response contains (comment object structure), and the side effects (comment visibility to task collaborators). The description also includes unnecessary permission information that doesn't add operational clarity. The improved description specifies the input requirements, return value structure, and the effect of adding a comment, making it significantly more useful for AI agents determining when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'NewNote' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description mentions limitations but lacks clarity on required inputs (order ID), expected outputs (note object), and what the operation accomplishes. Improved version specifies the action context (for an order), input requirements, output format, and constraints for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description:
Creates a new note in [VTEX DO](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-do--7KMbRL4OslN8DTX9oiuCiu). Be aware of the following limitations:

- The maximum number of notes for an order is 30.

- The maximum number of characters in a note's description is 2000.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new note for an order
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new note associated with a specific order in VTEX DO. Expects an order ID and note description in the request body. Returns the created note object with its ID and metadata. Note: Maximum 30 notes per order; description limited to 2000 characters.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description mentions limitations but lacks clarity on required inputs (order ID), expected outputs (note object), and what the operation accomplishes. Improved version specifies the action context (for an order), input requirements, output format, and constraints for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description:
Creates a new task in [VTEX DO](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-do--7KMbRL4OslN8DTX9oiuCiu). 

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new task in VTEX DO
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new task in VTEX DO for order management. Expects task details such as title, description, assignee, and target order ID in the request body. Returns the created task object with its ID, status, and metadata. The task is immediately available for assignment and tracking.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is minimal and lacks essential information about inputs, outputs, and task state. Improved version specifies the action context, required/expected input fields, return value structure, and the resulting state of the created task for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'Listtasksbyassignee' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic for an operation with multiple filtering capabilities. The description itself is comprehensive with good examples, but the summary should better reflect the filtering flexibility. Improved summary indicates the operation supports multiple filtering options, making it clearer for AI agents to understand when to use this versus other task retrieval operations.

data.current_description:
This endpoint allows you to filter [VTEX DO](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-do--7KMbRL4OslN8DTX9oiuCiu) tasks. You can choose between the following filtering options:

- **Assignees:** using `assignee.email` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?assignee.email={{person@email.com}}&status={{open}}`. 

- **Targets:** using `targetId` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?target.id={{name}}&status={{open}}`. 

- **Paged tasks:** using `page`, `perPage` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?page={{1}}&perPage={{10}}&status=;{{-Closed}}`. 

- **Context:** using `context`, `page`, `perPage` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?context={{context}}&page={{1}}&perPage={{10}}&status={{-Closed}}`. 

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
data.summary_suggestion: List and filter tasks by multiple criteria
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic for an operation with multiple filtering capabilities. The description itself is comprehensive with good examples, but the summary should better reflect the filtering flexibility. Improved summary indicates the operation supports multiple filtering options, making it clearer for AI agents to understand when to use this versus other task retrieval operations.

data.current_description:
Updates the status of a [VTEX DO](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/vtex-do--7KMbRL4OslN8DTX9oiuCiu) task, filtering by task ID.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).
data.description_suggestion: Updates a task in VTEX DO by task ID. Accepts task status changes and other updatable fields in the request body. Returns the updated task object with new status and metadata. Common status values include open, in-progress, and closed.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic - description mentions 'status' but summary doesn't. Description is vague about what can be updated and what is returned. Improved version clarifies that both status and other details can be updated, specifies the return value, and provides context about common status values for better AI agent understanding of the operation's scope.
